title: Neetflex Banned Accounts
description: Find account IDs that are active in the Accounts table but marked as banned in the BannedAccounts table.
constraints: account_id is the primary key of Accounts
account_id is the primary key of BannedAccounts
key_concept: Simple INNER JOIN or IN subquery to find matching IDs between two tables.

hints.L1: Find account_ids that appear in both tables.
hints.L2: SELECT account_id FROM Accounts WHERE account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM BannedAccounts)
hints.L3: SELECT a.account_id FROM Accounts a JOIN BannedAccounts b ON a.account_id = b.account_id

optimal_solution: SELECT account_id FROM Accounts WHERE account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM BannedAccounts);
